summary: Fixed the 7 hand-written novel commands' Example fields to be full runnable command lines matching the generated commands' convention, instead of bare argument fragments.
reason: The 7 novel commands (trends changes/geo-gap/history-search/opportunities/seasonality/stale/trending-at) had Cobra Example fields like "coffee --since 7d --agent" -- bare argument fragments -- instead of the established convention "  google-trends-pp-cli trends <subcommand> <args>" used by every generated command. Live dogfood's example-extractor couldn't find a runnable command line in these, failing all 7 with 'missing runnable example'.
validated_outcome: Live dogfood: all 7 'missing runnable example' failures cleared after this fix.
